mnemonics.acronym: Continental bridges a Tearing membranes e g
mnemonics.visual_anchor: A bloated salamander sits atop the c a t e g o r y m a r a t h o n ( g e n e r a l - m e n ) architecture, its eyes weeping C a t e g o r y M a r a t h o n ( G e n e r a l - M e n ). Each blink sends signals through its withering nervous system.
mnemonics.scent_anchor: Close your eyes. The Ambrosia fills the room, suffocatingly sweet like wilting funeral flowers in an enclosed room. Underneath it, barely detectable, the Ammonia lingers — sharp and eye-watering like an uncleaned reptile tank. You will not forget C a t e g o r y M a r a t h o n ( G e n e r a l - M e n ).
mnemonics.logic_link: The translucent newts is your brain's trigger for **C a t e g o r y M a r a t h o n ( G e n e r a l - M e n )** — just as translucent newts withering/decaying, so does this concept operate.
